ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' — furigana glyph 'コレ' misread as 'つし', low severity as meaning is preserved by surrounding context.

reviewer_notes: Page covers clock frequency explanation with metronome/CPU diagram and clock waveform diagram. Main body text fully captured including 2.5GHz calculation example and 10^9 notation. Two image placeholders for diagrams are acceptable. Minor furigana misread on the 'コレ' callout banner.
